untranslatable_reason: Signal requires t-values from microstructural regression estimates (order flow imbalance t-value, liquidity premium t-value) which are not available in the allowed indicator set. These are advanced econometric outputs requiring custom regression analysis, not standard technical indicators. Additionally, 'signed volume directional bias' requires custom volatility/imbalance decomposition not present in allowed indicators. Critical thresholds for t-value triggers are also unspecified ([THRESHOLD_NEEDED] placeholders).
translation_notes: This signal is fundamentally incompatible with standard technical analysis indicators. It requires: (1) Custom microstructural regression model outputs with t-statistics, (2) Order flow decomposition analysis, (3) Liquidity premium estimation with statistical significance testing. The signal cannot be translated to standard OHLCV-based technical indicators. To implement, a custom indicator module computing these microstructural metrics would be required upstream of the backtest engine.
